{ "name": "eslint-plugin-react-refresh", "description": "Validate that your components can safely be updated with Fast Refresh", "version": "0.4.26", "type": "commonjs", "author": "Arnaud Barré (https://github.com/ArnaudBarre)", "license": "MIT", "repository": "github:ArnaudBarre/eslint-plugin-react-refresh", "main": "index.js", "types": "index.d.ts", "keywords": [ "eslint", "eslint-plugin", "react", "react-refresh", "fast refresh" ], "peerDependencies": { "eslint": ">=8.40" } }
